summary: Plan-only remediation assessment completed for five independent open PRs. None is eligible for a merge recommendation from this artifact because the required merge preflight is incomplete, most notably missing a passed Codex /review proof and, for some PRs, mergeability or review-bot/comment resolution proof. No security-sensitive items were detected.
